# Third-Party Outdoor Assets

Downloaded on `2026-04-02` from the original asset pages and reviewed for commercial-release compatibility.

## Active Outdoor Asset Sets

### Kenney Top Down Shooter

- Source: https://kenney.nl/assets/top-down-shooter
- Vendored path: `game/assets/outdoor/third_party/kenney`
- License: `CC0 1.0`
- Notes: Commercial use allowed. Attribution not required.

Currently used files:

- `PNG/Survivor 1/survivor1_stand.png`
- `License.txt`

### (12x12) City Tiles - Top Down

- Source: https://opengameart.org/content/12x12-city-tiles-top-down
- Vendored path: `game/assets/outdoor/third_party/opengameart/TopDownCityPack`
- License: `CC0`
- Notes: Commercial use allowed. Attribution not required, though the author says it is appreciated.

Currently used files:

- `Sprites/sMockup.png`
- `Sprites/Vehicles/sBlueCar.png`
- `Sprites/Vehicles/sGreenPickup.png`
- `Readme.txt`

## License Reference

- Kenney support / license page: https://kenney.nl/support
- OpenGameArt asset page license declaration: https://opengameart.org/content/12x12-city-tiles-top-down

These outdoor assets were selected because their licenses are explicit and compatible with a commercial mobile release target.
